item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4257 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4257 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Contact Form by Supsystic plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE) in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.36. This is due to the plugin using the Twig `Twig_Loader_String` template engine without sandboxing, combined with the `cfsPreFill` prefill functionality that allows unauthenticated users to inject arbitrary Twig expressions into fo...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4257

item.title: [Segurança] New Chrome Zero-Day CVE-2026-5281 Under Active Exploitation — Patch Released
item.description:
🚨 New Chrome Zero-Day CVE-2026-5281 Under Active Exploitation — Patch Released
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Google on Thursday released security updates for its Chrome web browser to address 21 vulnerabilities, including a zero-day flaw that it said has been exploited in the wild. The high-severity vulnerability, CVE-2026-5281 (CVSS score: N/A), concerns a use-after-free bug in Dawn, an open-source and cross-platform implementation of the WebGPU standard. "Use-after-free in Dawn in Google Chrome prior
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/new-chrome-zero-day-cve-2026-5281-under.html

item.title: [Segurança] TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks on Southeast Asian Government Networks
item.description:
🚨 TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks on Southeast Asian Government Networks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
A high-severity security flaw in the TrueConf client video conferencing software has been exploited in the wild as a zero-day as part of a campaign targeting government entities in Southeast Asia dubbed TrueChaos. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-3502 (CVSS score: 7.8), a lack of integrity check when fetching application update code, allowing an attacker to distribute a tampered update,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/trueconf-zero-day-exploited-in-attacks.html

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-3776 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3776 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
The application does not validate the presence of required appearance (AP) data before accessing stamp annotation resources. When a PDF contains a stamp annotation missing its AP entry, the code continues to dereference the associated object without a prior null or validity check, which allows a crafted document to trigger a null pointer dereference and crash the application, resulting in denial of service.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3776

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8135-1: Pillow vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8135-1: Pillow vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that Pillow did not correctly handle reading J2K files, which could lead to an out-of-bounds read vulnerability. If a user or automated system were tricked into opening a specially crafted file, an attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2021-25287, CVE-2021-25288) It was discovered that Pillow did not correctly handle certain integer arithmetic, which could lead to...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8135-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-4819 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4819 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.9
Resumo:
In Search Guard FLX versions from 1.0.0 up to 4.0.1, the audit logging feature might log user credentials from users logging into Kibana.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4819

item.title: [Segurança] Google fixes fourth Chrome zero-day exploited in attacks in 2026
item.description:

Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Google has fixed the fourth Chrome vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks since the start of the year.

item.title: [Segurança] Routine Access Is Powering Modern Intrusions, a New Threat Report Finds
item.description:
💣 Routine Access Is Powering Modern Intrusions, a New Threat Report Finds
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Modern intrusions increasingly start with valid credentials and routine access, not exploits. Blackpoint Cyber's upcoming threat report shows how VPN abuse, RMM tools, and social engineering drive most incidents.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/routine-access-is-powering-modern-intrusions-a-new-threat-report-finds/

item.title: [Segurança] Claude AI finds Vim, Emacs RCE bugs that trigger on file open
item.description:
📰 Claude AI finds Vim, Emacs RCE bugs that trigger on file open
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Vulnerabilities in the Vim and GNU Emacs text editors, discovered using simple prompts with the Claude assistant, allow remote code execution simply by opening a file.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/claude-ai-finds-vim-emacs-rce-bugs-that-trigger-on-file-open/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Docker Sandboxes: Run Agents in YOLO Mode, Safely
item.description:
📰 Docker Sandboxes: Run Agents in YOLO Mode, Safely
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Over a quarter of all production code is now AI-authored, and developers who use agents are merging roughly 60% more pull requests. But these gains only come when you let agents run autonomously. And to unlock that, you have to get out of the way.That means letting agents run without...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/docker-sandboxes-run-agents-in-yolo-mode-safely/
